scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,next,tauri -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:next" "npm run dev:tauri"
scripts.dev:next: wait-on http://localhost:8000/docs -d 1000 && cd frontend && npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:tauri: wait-on http://localhost:3001 -d 1000 && cd frontend && source ~/.cargo/env && npx tauri dev
scripts.build:mac: cd frontend && npm run build && npx tauri build
